system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet_by_mact","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_DONDATHANG_CHITIET_BY_MACT]
(
	@MACT NVARCHAR(200),
	@STATUS NVARCHAR(20)
)
AS
IF @STATUS = 'MATERIAL'
BEGIN
SELECT b.maddh, a.mancc, a.tenncc,
	CASE
		WHEN loaiddh = 'NKI' THEN N'Ngũ Kim'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'DGO' THEN N'Bao Bì'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'SON' THEN N'Sơn'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'GVA' THEN N'Gỗ ván'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'HTR' THEN N'Hàng trắng'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'OTHER' THEN N'Ngoài BOM'
       END AS loaiddh
	, ngaydat, ngaygiao
	, B.masp
	, b.chitiet, c.mota as tenchitiet, c.dvt
	, b.soluong, b.sl_danhan, b.sl_conlai
	, b.dongia
	, b.donhang
	, a.lan_sua
	, b.create_by
	, c.quycach, c.mausac
INTO #RESULT1
FROM  tr_dondathang a, tr_dondathang_chitiet b, tr_material c
WHERE a.maddh = b.maddh
	and b.chitiet = ISNULL(c.idxuong, c.mavt)
	--and a.pheduyet = '1' 
	and A.active = 1
	and b.chitiet LIKE @MACT;

	SELECT A.maddh
		, A.mancc
		, ISNULL(B.vendor_name, A.tenncc) AS tenncc
		, A.loaiddh
		, A.ngaydat, A.ngaygiao
		, A.masp
		, A.chitiet, A.tenchitiet, A.dvt
		, A.soluong, A.sl_danhan, A.sl_conlai
		, A.dongia
		, A.donhang
		, A.lan_sua
		, A.create_by
		, a.quycach, a.mausac
	--INTO #RESULT1_1
	FROM #RESULT1 A 
		LEFT JOIN tr_nhacc B ON A.mancc = B.vendor_id
	
	--SELECT A.*, B.dongia AS dongia_goc
	--	, (A.dongia - B.dongia) AS dongia_chenhlech
	--	, B.id
	--FROM #RESULT1_1 A
	--	LEFT JOIN tr_material_price B ON A.chitiet = B.mact AND A.mancc = B.mancc
	--ORDER BY A.maddh

END

IF @STATUS = 'CODE'
BEGIN
SELECT b.maddh, a.mancc, a.tenncc,
	CASE
		WHEN loaiddh = 'NKI' THEN N'Ngũ Kim'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'DGO' THEN N'Bao Bì'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'SON' THEN N'Sơn'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'GVA' THEN N'Gỗ ván'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'HTR' THEN N'Hàng trắng'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'OTHER' THEN N'Ngoài BOM'
       END AS loaiddh
	, ngaydat, ngaygiao
	, B.masp
	, b.chitiet, c.mota as tenchitiet, c.dvt
	, b.soluong, b.sl_danhan, b.sl_conlai
	, b.dongia
	, b.donhang
	, a.lan_sua
	, b.create_by
	, c.quycach, c.mausac
INTO #RESULT2
FROM  tr_dondathang a, tr_dondathang_chitiet b, tr_material c
WHERE a.maddh = b.maddh
	and b.chitiet = ISNULL(c.idxuong, c.mavt)
	--and a.pheduyet = '1' 
	and A.active = 1
	and b.maddh LIKE @MACT;

	SELECT A.maddh
		, A.mancc
		, ISNULL(B.vendor_name, A.tenncc) AS tenncc
		, A.loaiddh
		, A.ngaydat, A.ngaygiao
		, A.masp
		, A.chitiet, A.tenchitiet, A.dvt
		, A.soluong, A.sl_danhan, A.sl_conlai
		, A.dongia
		, A.donhang
		, A.lan_sua
		, A.create_by
		, a.quycach, a.mausac
	--INTO #RESULT2_1
	FROM #RESULT2 A 
		LEFT JOIN tr_nhacc B ON A.mancc = B.vendor_id;
	
	--SELECT A.*, B.dongia AS dongia_goc
	--	, (A.dongia - B.dongia) AS dongia_chenhlech
	--	, B.id
	--FROM #RESULT2_1 A
	--	LEFT JOIN tr_material_price B ON A.chitiet = B.mact AND A.mancc = B.mancc
	--ORDER BY A.maddh


END
IF @STATUS = 'NCC'
BEGIN
	SELECT b.maddh, a.mancc, a.tenncc,
	CASE
		WHEN loaiddh = 'NKI' THEN N'Ngũ Kim'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'DGO' THEN N'Bao Bì'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'SON' THEN N'Sơn'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'GVA' THEN N'Gỗ ván'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'HTR' THEN N'Hàng trắng'
		WHEN loaiddh = 'OTHER' THEN N'Ngoài BOM'
       END AS loaiddh
	, ngaydat, ngaygiao
	, B.masp
	, b.chitiet, c.mota as tenchitiet, c.dvt
	, b.soluong, b.sl_danhan, b.sl_conlai
	, b.dongia
	, b.donhang
	, a.lan_sua
	, b.create_by
	, c.quycach, c.mausac
INTO #RESULT3
FROM  tr_dondathang a, tr_dondathang_chitiet b, tr_material c
WHERE a.maddh = b.maddh
	and b.chitiet = ISNULL(c.idxuong, c.mavt)
	--and a.pheduyet = '1' 
	and A.active = 1
	and a.mancc = @MACT;

	SELECT A.maddh
		, A.mancc
		, ISNULL(B.vendor_name, A.tenncc) AS tenncc
		, A.loaiddh
		, A.ngaydat, A.ngaygiao
		, A.masp
		, A.chitiet, A.tenchitiet, A.dvt
		, A.soluong, A.sl_danhan, A.sl_conlai
		, A.dongia
		, A.donhang
		, A.lan_sua
		, A.create_by
		, a.quycach, a.mausac
	--INTO #RESULT2_1
	FROM #RESULT3 A 
		LEFT JOIN tr_nhacc B ON A.mancc = B.vendor_id;
END



","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_nhacc"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
